name: aseprite-codex
description: Automate Aseprite exports and inspections from Codex using a local MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Bring Aseprite into Codex with a local MCP server built for pixel-art workflows. Inspect layers, tags, and slices, export sprite sheets and frame sequences, and run Lua scripts without leaving your coding session.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this .aseprite file and list its tags and layers
Export this sprite as a packed sheet plus json metadata
Run an Aseprite Lua script over my sprite assets
